indexdef: CREATE INDEX idx_profiles_deleted_at ON public.profiles USING btree (deleted_at) WHERE (deleted_at IS NULL)
CREATE INDEX idx_profiles_created_by ON public.profiles USING btree (created_by)
CREATE INDEX idx_profiles_role ON public.profiles USING btree (role)
CREATE INDEX idx_loans_chromebook_id ON public.loans USING btree (chromebook_id)
CREATE INDEX idx_loans_created_by ON public.loans USING btree (created_by)
CREATE INDEX idx_loans_loan_date ON public.loans USING btree (loan_date DESC)
CREATE INDEX idx_loans_user_type ON public.loans USING btree (user_type)
CREATE INDEX idx_loans_loan_type ON public.loans USING btree (loan_type)
CREATE INDEX idx_loans_expected_return_date ON public.loans USING btree (expected_return_date) WHERE (expected_return_date IS NOT NULL)
CREATE INDEX idx_loans_chromebook_active ON public.loans USING btree (chromebook_id, loan_date)
CREATE INDEX idx_chromebooks_created_by ON public.chromebooks USING btree (created_by)
CREATE INDEX idx_chromebooks_status ON public.chromebooks USING btree (status) WHERE (status IS NOT NULL)
CREATE INDEX idx_chromebooks_chromebook_id ON public.chromebooks USING btree (chromebook_id)
CREATE INDEX idx_chromebooks_location ON public.chromebooks USING btree (location) WHERE (location IS NOT NULL)
CREATE INDEX idx_chromebooks_classroom ON public.chromebooks USING btree (classroom) WHERE (classroom IS NOT NULL)
CREATE INDEX idx_chromebooks_manufacturer ON public.chromebooks USING btree (manufacturer) WHERE (manufacturer IS NOT NULL)
CREATE INDEX idx_chromebooks_status_location ON public.chromebooks USING btree (status, location) WHERE ((status IS NOT NULL) AND (location IS NOT NULL))
CREATE INDEX idx_chromebooks_deleted_at ON public.chromebooks USING btree (deleted_at) WHERE (deleted_at IS NULL)
CREATE INDEX idx_returns_created_by ON public.returns USING btree (created_by)
CREATE INDEX idx_returns_loan_id ON public.returns USING btree (loan_id)
CREATE INDEX idx_returns_return_date ON public.returns USING btree (return_date DESC)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_alunos_email_unique ON public.alunos USING btree (lower(email))
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_alunos_ra_unique ON public.alunos USING btree (upper(ra))
CREATE INDEX idx_alunos_turma ON public.alunos USING btree (turma)
CREATE INDEX idx_alunos_nome ON public.alunos USING gin (to_tsvector('portuguese'::regconfig, nome_completo))
CREATE INDEX idx_alunos_deleted_at ON public.alunos USING btree (deleted_at) WHERE (deleted_at IS NULL)
CREATE INDEX idx_professores_materia ON public.professores USING btree (materia)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_professores_email_unique ON public.professores USING btree (lower(email))
CREATE INDEX idx_professores_nome ON public.professores USING gin (to_tsvector('portuguese'::regconfig, nome_completo))
CREATE INDEX idx_professores_deleted_at ON public.professores USING btree (deleted_at) WHERE (deleted_at IS NULL)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_funcionarios_email_unique ON public.funcionarios USING btree (lower(email))
CREATE INDEX idx_funcionarios_nome ON public.funcionarios USING gin (to_tsvector('portuguese'::regconfig, nome_completo))
CREATE INDEX idx_funcionarios_deleted_at ON public.funcionarios USING btree (deleted_at) WHERE (deleted_at IS NULL)
CREATE INDEX idx_inventory_audits_created_by ON public.inventory_audits USING btree (created_by)
CREATE INDEX idx_inventory_audits_status ON public.inventory_audits USING btree (status)
CREATE INDEX idx_audit_items_counted_by ON public.audit_items USING btree (counted_by)
CREATE INDEX idx_audit_items_audit_id ON public.audit_items USING btree (audit_id)
CREATE INDEX idx_audit_items_chromebook_id ON public.audit_items USING btree (chromebook_id)
CREATE INDEX idx_reservations_professor_id ON public.reservations USING btree (professor_id)
CREATE INDEX idx_reservations_space_id ON public.reservations USING btree (space_id)
CREATE INDEX idx_reservations_date_time ON public.reservations USING btree (date, time_slot)
CREATE INDEX idx_reservations_professor ON public.reservations USING btree (professor_id)
